raw_consumer_statement: Im really totally perplexed and exhausted from dealing with American Express on charges showing on my account that I have been credited for either buy the merchant or had to dispute it. their accounting is severely off. Please see the attachment back in XXXX of this year. I only owed about {$1000.00} on this card. And Ive been pretty much credited with everything since XXXX with the exception of a few minor things that equal up to maybe {$800.00} my balance is now {$5000.00}, it was showing about {$8000.00} a month ago. no one can explain it either and explain where the charges are coming from which is why I am hiring an attorney and filing a lawsuit. Someone at American Express has their accounting incorrect. The same applies for my other American Express blue cash card as well.
